selection_criteria: ROM offset and size are known
the current Expansion counterpart path exists
notes: This is a planning list only. No non-audio build path is switched by this manifest.
Each candidate stores the raw BPEJ ROM slice hash separately from the source DB verification hash because some DB hashes describe decompressed payloads.
one_to_many entries require a composite wrapper and must not replace multiple source files independently.
Partial entries, byte mismatches, unknown sizes, text, scripts, maps, tilesets, Pokemon or trainer sprite families, fonts, cries, and animation metadata are excluded.
